fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKWebpEncoder` provides static methods for encoding raster images and animation sequences
into the WebP format. Use the `Encode` overloads for single-frame encoding and the
`EncodeAnimated` overloads for multi-frame animated WebP files.

WebP supports both lossy and lossless encoding. Control the quality and compression settings
through the <xref:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions> parameter.

## Examples

```csharp
// Encode a single bitmap to a WebP byte array.
using var bitmap = new SKBitmap(100, 100);
using var data = SKWebpEncoder.Encode(bitmap.PeekPixels(), SKWebpEncoderOptions.Default);
File.WriteAllBytes("image.webp", data.ToArray());

// Encode an animated WebP.
var frames = new[]
{
    new SKWebpEncoderFrame(frame1Bitmap, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100)),
    new SKWebpEncoderFrame(frame2Bitmap, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100)),
};
using var animData = SKWebpEncoder.EncodeAnimated(frames, SKWebpEncoderOptions.Default);
File.WriteAllBytes("animation.webp", animData.ToArray());
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Provides static methods for encoding images and animations in the WebP format.

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> containing the encoded WebP data, or <see langword="null" /> if encoding fails.
fields.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap as a WebP image and returns the encoded data.

params.options: The encoding options, including quality and compression settings.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKData? Encode (SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the image was successfully encoded; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap as a WebP image and writes the encoded data to the provided stream.

params.options: The encoding options, including quality and compression settings.
params.dst: The destination stream to write the encoded WebP data to.

entries.signature: public static bool Encode (SkiaSharp.SKWStream dst, SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the image was successfully encoded; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap as a WebP image and writes the encoded data to the provided managed stream.

params.options: The encoding options, including quality and compression settings.
params.dst: The managed destination stream to write the encoded WebP data to.

entries.signature: public static bool Encode (System.IO.Stream dst, SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> containing the encoded animated WebP data, or <see langword="null" /> if encoding fails.
fields.summary: Encodes a sequence of frames as an animated WebP image and returns the encoded data.

params.options: The encoding options applied to each frame.
params.frames: A read-only span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> values defining the animation frames and their durations.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKData? EncodeAnimated (ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the animation was successfully encoded; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Encodes a sequence of frames as an animated WebP image and writes the encoded data to the provided stream.

params.options: The encoding options applied to each frame.
params.frames: A read-only span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> values defining the animation frames and their durations.
params.dst: The destination stream to write the encoded animated WebP data to.

entries.signature: public static bool EncodeAnimated (SkiaSharp.SKWStream dst, ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the animation was successfully encoded; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Encodes a sequence of frames as an animated WebP image and writes the encoded data to the provided managed stream.

params.options: The encoding options applied to each frame.
params.frames: A read-only span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> values defining the animation frames and their durations.
params.dst: The managed destination stream to write the encoded animated WebP data to.

entries.signature: public static bool EncodeAnimated (System.IO.Stream dst, ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);
